common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.screenProtectionDesc: Prevents screenshots and screen recordings on sensitive screens.
settings.requiresAppLock: Enable App Lock to back up your data.
settings.appLockTrustNote: App Lock protects opening StackLab. Exported backups are encrypted. For full protection, keep your phone secure too.

errors.updateFailed: Couldn't save your changes. Please try again.

export.title: Export your data?
export.message: Your data is encrypted with your App Lock PIN before export. Only you can open it.

replace.title: Replace all data?
replace.message: This permanently deletes everything currently on this device and replaces it with the imported file. Requires App Lock. Your current data is encrypted and saved automatically before anything is deleted.

deleteData.title: Delete all your data?
deleteData.description: This permanently erases every lab, deck, item, and value snapshot on this device. This cannot be undone, and no backup is made automatically before this action.

deleteBackup.title: Delete the backup file?
deleteBackup.description: Removes the automatic backup stored on this device. Your labs, decks, and items are not affected — only the backup copy is deleted.

disableLock.title: Disable App Lock?
disableLock.message: Your PIN will be kept in case you re-enable App Lock later.
disableLock.pin: Confirm PIN to disable App Lock

info.title: What does this do?
info.replace: Erases everything currently on this device and replaces it with the file you choose. Anything added since that file was made will be lost. Your current data is backed up automatically first, before anything is deleted.
info.deleteData: Permanently erases everything in this app — labs, decks, items, and value history. This does NOT delete copies you've already saved elsewhere: manual exports you've shared, or backups already stored in iCloud/Google Drive.
info.deleteBackup: Removes the automatic backup file stored on this device. This does NOT delete older copies iCloud or Google Drive may have already saved on their own — manage those from your phone's own settings.
info.autoWipe: If someone enters the wrong PIN 10 times in a row, everything on this device is permanently deleted — labs, decks, items, snapshots — with no automatic backup beforehand. Off by default; only enable this if you understand and want that risk.

welcome.title: Welcome to the StackLab beta
welcome.body: Thanks for testing StackLab! This internal beta lets you track your precious metals collection. Join the Discord for any question or bug to report.

discord.title: Join the StackLab Discord
discord.subtitle: Report a bug, ask a question, chat with other testers.

item.photoHint: Tap to shoot or pick from library
item.photoPermissionDeniedMessage: Allow access to photos or camera to add an image.
item.photoGenericError: Could not add this photo. Try again.
item.movePremiumNote: Create a second lab to move items between labs — Premium
item.priceBasisRequired: Choose whether this price is for one unit or for the whole lot to avoid an incorrect calculation.
item.priceBasisRowRequired: Choose whether this price is for one unit or for the whole row to avoid an incorrect calculation.

create.title: New Item
create.lotTip:
You can add multiple {{name}} at once.
Use the table below to distribute by year and strike finish.
create.step4Subtitle: Optional — skip if you don't want to track cost basis.
create.underMeltHint: Price below melt value — spot may vary
create.step4SubtitleWishlist: Optional — the price you've seen this item listed for.
create.step4SubtitleMix: Each row will create a separate item — enter the price paid for each one, or leave blank.
create.step4SubtitleMixWishlist: Each row will create a separate wish — enter the observed price for each one, or leave blank.
create.creationFailedRows: Creation failed on one or more rows. Please try again.

applock.cooldown: Too many attempts. Try again in {{duration}}.

setup.title: Set up App Lock
setup.warning: ⚠️ If you forget your PIN, there is no recovery. Keep it safe like a seed phrase.
setup.warningBody: There's no account and no "forgot PIN" — if you lose it, the only way back in is reinstalling the app, which erases everything on this device. Write it down somewhere safe, the way you would a crypto wallet seed phrase.
setup.warningChangeNote: Backup files exported before this change will still require your current PIN.

disable.title: Disable App Lock
disable.enterPin: Enter your PIN to disable App Lock

prompt.title: Set up App Lock?
prompt.message: Protect your stack with a PIN and Face ID / Fingerprint.
prompt.heading: Lock your stack
prompt.sub: Add a PIN so no one else can open StackLab — even with your phone already unlocked.

import.title: Enter PIN to decrypt
import.titleReplace: Enter PIN to decrypt and replace
import.hint: Enter the PIN used when this backup was created.
import.wrongPin: Wrong PIN — the file could not be decrypted.

errors.exportRequiresLock: Enable App Lock to create encrypted backups.
errors.replaceRequiresLock: Enable App Lock before using Replace — your data must be encrypted before it can be overwritten.
errors.importInvalidFile: This file couldn't be read — it may be corrupted or not a StackLab export.
errors.importVersionMismatch: This file was made with a different version of StackLab and can't be imported.
errors.importWrongPin: Wrong PIN — the file could not be decrypted.
errors.reencryptFailed: Your PIN was updated, but the backup file couldn't be re-encrypted. It still uses your old PIN.

step1.title: Your first item
step1.subtitle: Add your first gold or silver piece to get started.

backup.title: Back up your stack
backup.subtitle: We'll automatically save a backup to your {{cloud}} — nothing leaves your phone except to your own {{cloud}}.
backup.hint: You can turn this on or off anytime in Settings.
